home.collectionsSubtitle: High-performance enterprise hardware sourced from corporate refresh cycles—reliability meets value.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Customers love our products and we always strive to please them all.
home.review1: These are sooo pretty and very comfy. Perfect colour as well. I love using this setup with my new corporate client laptop. Wicked cute… 😍
home.review2: A perfect product — it keeps the workstation performing beautifully without any heating. Sourced Latitude laptops for our coding team. Couldn’t be happier with the purchase!
home.newsletterTitle: Get Early Access to Inventory Drops
home.newsletterSubtitle: Corporate fleet refreshes move fast. Subscribe to receive matching lot releases before they hit the catalogue.

deals.metaDescription: The largest savings in the catalogue — refurbished business hardware at clearance pricing, warranty included.
deals.title: Today’s best savings
deals.subtitle: Ranked by percentage saved against original list price. Every unit keeps its full warranty — prices hold while stock lasts, no countdown gimmicks.
deals.moreDeals: {count, plural, one {# more deal} other {# more deals}}
deals.emptyBody: Check back soon — corporate returns land weekly and the best units go on clearance first.

pages.brandsMetaDescription: Refurbished hardware from Dell, HP, Lenovo, Apple, ASUS, Acer, Cisco and Intel.
pages.brandsDescription: The manufacturers we see most often in corporate refresh cycles.
pages.categoriesMetaDescription: Browse refurbished laptops, desktops, servers, networking, monitors, storage, components and accessories.
pages.categoriesDescription: Business-grade hardware sourced from corporate refresh cycles and lease returns.
pages.shopMetaDescription: Browse certified refurbished laptops, desktops, servers, networking, monitors, storage and components — all tested, graded and warranty-backed.
pages.shopDescription: Every unit is functionally tested, data-sanitised and graded on a published scale before it reaches this page.
pages.searchMatches: {count, plural, one {# match found.} other {# matches found.}}
pages.searchPrompt: Enter a product, brand or specification in the search bar above.
pages.nothingSearchedDesc: Use the search bar to find laptops, servers, docks and more.
pages.noResultsDesc: Check the spelling, try a broader term, or browse the full catalogue.

notFound.title: We couldn’t find that page
notFound.body: The link may be out of date, or the page may have moved.

faqs.metaDescription: Common questions about collection times, documentation, on-site destruction and multi-site engagements.
faqs.title: Questions we’re asked most
faqs.stillBody: Speak to a specialist about your estate and compliance needs.

certificates.metaDescription: ISO 27001, ISO 14001, R2v3 and NIST 800-88 aligned processes, with serial-level certificates of destruction for every asset.
certificates.title: Evidence, not assurances
certificates.description: Accreditation governs how we operate. The paperwork you receive is what proves it, years after the collection.
certificates.docsDescription: Issued after every engagement, at the serial-number level.
certificates.doc1Desc: Issued per asset with serial number, method of destruction and date. The document auditors ask for by name.
certificates.doc2Desc: Per-device erasure verification, including any media quarantined for physical destruction after a failed wipe.
certificates.doc3Desc: Weight recovered, diversion rate and downstream partners — formatted to drop into ESG disclosures.

contact.metaDescription: Request a collection or schedule a consultation with an IT asset disposal specialist.
contact.title: Request a pickup
contact.description: Tell us roughly what you need decommissioned and we’ll come back with a scope and timeline.

industries.metaDescription: IT asset disposal for healthcare, education, government, banking, corporate, IT and manufacturing organisations.
industries.title: Trusted across regulated sectors
industries.description: Different regulators, different evidence requirements. We adapt the documentation to whichever framework you answer to.
industries.ctx_healthcare: PHI-bearing media handled under HIPAA retention requirements.
industries.ctx_education: Bulk lab and campus refreshes scheduled around term dates.
industries.ctx_government: Chain-of-custody documentation suitable for public audit.
industries.ctx_banking: Destruction evidence aligned to SOX and regulator expectations.
industries.ctx_corporate: Multi-site refresh cycles consolidated into one engagement.
industries.ctx_it-companies: High-volume estates with rapid hardware turnover.
industries.ctx_manufacturing: OT and industrial equipment alongside standard IT assets.

process.metaDescription: From assessment and insured pickup through data wiping, physical destruction, recycling and serial-level certification.
process.title: Seven stages, fully documented
process.description: Every asset is tracked from collection to certificate. Nothing leaves the chain of custody unrecorded.
process.ctaBody: We scope your estate and compliance obligations before anything is collected.

services.metaDescription: Secure data wiping, hard drive destruction, IT asset disposal, e-waste recycling, corporate pickup, asset recovery and certificates of destruction.
services.title: Everything the decommission requires
services.description: Engage a single service or hand over the entire asset lifecycle. Every option produces the same audit-grade documentation.

serviceDetail.auditLine: Every engagement produces a serial-level audit record, so the chain of custody is provable end to end.
serviceDetail.cmsNote: Detailed content for this service is managed in the CMS.

contactForm.name: Name
contactForm.detailsHint: Rough asset counts, locations and any compliance requirements help us respond accurately.
contactForm.successBody: A specialist will be in touch within one business day. For urgent collections, call us directly.

contactForm.valPhone: That phone number looks too long.
contactForm.valCompany: That company name looks too long.

home.metaTitle: Global IT Asset Disposition (ITAD) Services | Secure Data Destruction & Asset Recovery
home.metaDescription: Secure IT Asset Disposition (ITAD) with certified data destruction, global recycling, refurbishment, resale, and audit-ready compliance across 120+ countries.

compliance.eyebrow: Built for the frameworks you answer to
compliance.title: Certified Compliance for Global Auditors
compliance.subtitle: Certifications govern how we operate. The documentation you receive is what proves it — years after the pickup.
compliance.badgeAlt: ISO 27001 certified penetration test reporting compliance badge
compliance.isoBody: Certified information security management systems governing secure data sanitisation, physical drive shredding, and global IT asset disposition workflows.

hero.heroAlt: Global IT asset disposition hardware and storage infrastructure
